resources.string: Stay focused and productive by blocking distracting apps during your focus sessions

FocusApp monitors your app usage to help you stay focused during your scheduled focus time. It requires accessibility permissions to detect when you open restricted apps and show you motivational reminders.
📱 You opened a distracting app! Focus on your goals!
⏱️ You have more important things to do right now
💪 You can do this! Stay focused!
🎯 Remember your goal for this focus session
✨ You're almost there! Don't give up!
You\'ve spent too much time on this app today. Consider taking a break!
